description: Happy path: signed deal with deliverables and brand review requirement returns full task list with critical path

input.project_title: Vintage Brass Co Kitchen Hardware Makeover
deliverables: dedicated YouTube long-form video featuring hardware installation
Instagram Reel showing before and after

expect.project_title: Vintage Brass Co Kitchen Hardware Makeover
expect.task_list: array of task objects ordered by due_date ascending, each with task_name, category, due_date, offset_label, owner, depends_on, notes
expect.categories_covered: at least pre-production, shoot, edit, review, and post categories present
expect.critical_path: array of task_name values including brand-review task due to special requirement
expect.special_requirements_applied: array containing the 72-hour brand review window entry
expect.brand_review_task: a review-category task with notes flagging the 72-hour brand review window dependency

prohibit: due_date values that are after the publish_date (except D-0 tasks)
fabricated dates not derived from publish_date offsets
tasks invented beyond what deliverables require

description: Minimal required inputs: single deliverable, no deal_id, no special requirements

expect.task_list: array covering pre-production through post phases for a single video deliverable
expect.critical_path: array present with core must-not-slip tasks (script, shoot, rough-cut, final-export, upload)

prohibit: brand review tasks when no brand review special requirement was listed
special_requirements_applied containing entries that were not in the input

description: Edge case: publish_date is only 5 days away, forcing compressed timeline with warnings

expect.task_list: array with compressed due_dates, some tasks sharing the same date or overlapping
expect.critical_path: array present reflecting the tight timeline
expect.notes_on_compression: at least one task notes field flags the compressed timeline or risk of missed steps

prohibit: due_dates before today (2026-07-01) since the project starts now
task list that ignores the tight timeline by using standard multi-week offsets
